events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What's your favourite track from the 'Dancing on the Ceiling' star?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: She just wants to have fun! Sending a massive happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper. Which of her colourful hits is a must-play for you?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Tribute Birthday
angles.copy: Thinking of the legendary George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move millions. What's his most iconic song for you?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who would have been 68 this year.

angles.name: Remembering MJ
angles.copy: 17 years ago, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's impact on music and culture remains unmatched. What's the first song that comes to mind?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Beat
angles.copy: Peace and love! Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. Which Beatles track truly showcases his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: A huge happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo from the maestro himself?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' electrifying frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Sir Mick Jagger is 83 today! Still got the moves like Jagger, what's your ultimate Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV officially launched, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember where you were when MTV launched? Today marks the anniversary of the channel that changed music forever, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, propelling them to global stardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969, promising '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud, music, and magic of Woodstock began! What's the ultimate performance from the iconic 1969 festival for you?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: 49 years today since we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His voice, his style, his legacy – forever etched in music history. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: 30 years. The legacy of Tupac Shakur lives on. A true poet and pioneer whose music still resonates today. What's your go-to Tupac track?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the unparalleled guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago today and would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years since the world lost a true musical innovator. Jimi Hendrix's guitar wizardry remains unmatched. What's your favourite Hendrix moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, the iconic 'Abbey Road', in the UK on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: That iconic zebra crossing! The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' album was released 57 years ago today. Which side of the record is your favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Rocker
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are timeless. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad Fer It Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid's 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice? As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released in the UK (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... John Lennon's timeless 'Imagine' saw its UK single release today in 1975. A song that still resonates globally.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple introduced the very first iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to our music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the day? 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How did it change your music world?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling adventures, what's your favourite 007 film or song? Shaken, not stirred.
